summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Arabic RTL social platform. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend flows working correctly with minor mobile responsiveness observation.

design_issues.issue: Mobile sidebar toggle button not visible on desktop viewport (expected behavior - only shows on mobile)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login, user registration, user login, logout, get current user, friend search, send friend request, get friend requests, get friends, invalid login handling, duplicate registration handling

Frontend: Login page load with RTL layout and dark theme, Arabic text display, toggle link verification, registration flow, dashboard verification, friends sidebar, chat area empty state, friend search functionality, logout functionality
Auth: JWT tokens with httpOnly cookies, session management, brute force protection
UI/UX: Dark theme, RTL layout, Arabic interface, responsive design elements
